title: Restyle ERD Add View Button for Consistency with Edit and Cancel
story: As a DataTools Pro user managing ERD views, I want the Add View button to be styled consistently with the Edit and Cancel buttons, so that all action buttons in the ERD toolbar have a uniform appearance.
description:
The Add View button on the ERD page has inconsistent styling compared to the Edit and Cancel buttons. Restyle it to use the same green button treatment with inline placement using the `input-group` CSS class.

## Changes
- Replace the current Add View icon/button with a styled green button matching Edit and Cancel
- Use the `input-group` class to place the dropdown and button inline on the same row
- Ensure the new button still triggers the existing Add View functionality (jQuery event bindings)

## Caution
Changing button DOM structure could impact jQuery selectors. Careful testing required to ensure existing event handlers continue to work.
acceptance_criteria: Add View button uses the same green button styling as Edit and Cancel
Button and dropdown are inline on the same row using input-group
Add View functionality still works correctly after restyle
ux_changes: ERD Add View button restyled to match Edit and Cancel buttons — green button with inline input-group layout.
implementation_notes: Product owner cautioned that changing the button DOM structure could break jQuery event bindings. Developer tested and confirmed functionality preserved.
comment_summary: Product owner provided code example for the input-group approach and cautioned about jQuery impacts. Developer implemented and confirmed working.
